LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RAYMOND SIMMONS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE SECOND JUDGMENT IS DENIED. NO JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE ANY BASIS FOR SETTING ASIDE THE SEPTEMBER 1, 2011 ORDER SUSTAINING A DEMURRER TO HIS AMENDED COMPLAINT. BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FILED AN APPEAL OF THAT ORDER, WHICH WAS DISMISSED AS PREMATURE DUE TO LACK OF A JUDGMENT, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION BELIEVES THAT JUDGMENT SHOULD NOW BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT TO BE SENT BY WAY OF E-MAIL TO THE COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND SIMMONS' Motion For Reconsideration is Off calendar. Notice of Appeal filed on June 15, 2012. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489

Mtn To Set Aside Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANA L. BURCH OF WALSWORTH, FRANKLIN & MCCALL, TEL. NO. 781-7072 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND SIMMONS' Motion To Set Aside Second Judgment is Denied. No judgment has been entered and plaintiff fails to state any basis for setting aside the September 1, 2011 order sustaining a demurrer to his amended complaint. Because plaintiff filed an appeal of that order, which was dismissed as premature due to lack of a judgment, the court on its own motion believes that judgment should now be entered in favor of defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT TO BE SENT BY WAY OF
E-MAIL TO THE COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK
